title: Project
description: A research project as exposed by the VU Amsterdam Pure REST web service (Pure API v5.34.3).

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object; prefer the UUID when present.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the project on the Pure Portal.

type.description: Classification reference for the project type.

managingOrganization.description: Reference to the managing organizational unit.

identifiers.description: External identifiers related to the project.

typeDiscriminator.description: Discriminator identifying the concrete project subtype.
